qa_pairs.question: Comparing the first two experiments, how did changing the 'Block read size' from 10MB to 100MB affect the 'Time counting chars'?
qa_pairs.answer: Changing the 'Block read size' from 10MB to 100MB decreased the 'Time counting chars' from 0m2.633s to 0m2.042s.

qa_pairs.answer: The 100MB 'Block read size' resulted in fewer 'GNU parallel jobs' (9 jobs) compared to the 10MB 'Block read size' (83 jobs).
